title: Design System Platform Starter Kit
goal: Build an AI-driven design system platform starter kit that uses .pen files as the single source of truth, converts designs to React/HTML components, includes component documentation, a TinaCMS site builder, and AI agents for design, implementation, accessibility, and color theory — all scaffoldable via create-protolab.

milestones.title: Foundation — .pen Parser + Code Generator
milestones.description: Extract and extend the .pen parser into the starter kit. Build the core pen-to-React and pen-to-HTML code generation pipeline. This is the foundation everything else builds on.

phases.name: extract-pen-parser-and-type-system
phases.title: Extract .pen parser and type system
phases.description: Create packages/pen/ in the starter kit. Extract PenDocument, PenNode (15 node types), and all .pen types from libs/types/src/pen.ts. Extract parsePenFile, traverseNodes, findNodeById, findNodes, findReusableComponents, resolveVariable, resolveRef, extractTheme, buildComponentMap from libs/pen-parser/. Create style-utils module extracting PenFill/PenStroke to CSS conversion from designs-view renderer. Strip all @protolabsai imports. Include the shadcn-kit.pen as an example design file.
acceptanceCriteria: Style utils convert fills/strokes to CSS

phases.name: build-pen-to-react-code-generator
phases.title: Build pen-to-React code generator
phases.description: Create packages/codegen/ with a pen-to-React pipeline. Takes a PenDocument AST, identifies component boundaries (reusable: true frames), and generates React component source code. For each reusable component: extract layout tree, convert frames to JSX divs with CSS flexbox, convert text nodes to styled spans, convert icon-fonts to Lucide imports, extract variables as CSS custom properties, generate prop interfaces from variable references. Output: .tsx files with co-located CSS modules or Tailwind classes.
acceptanceCriteria: Frames convert to divs with CSS flexbox
Text nodes convert to styled spans

phases.name: build-pen-to-html-code-generator
phases.title: Build pen-to-HTML code generator
phases.description: Add HTML/CSS output target to packages/codegen/. Generates semantic HTML with CSS custom properties. Simpler than React output — no props, no imports, just clean HTML + CSS. Useful for static sites, email templates, and framework-agnostic output.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS uses custom properties for theming
Output renders correctly in a browser
Semantic HTML elements used where appropriate

milestones.title: Design Tokens — W3C DTCG + Color Science
milestones.description: Build the design token system using W3C DTCG standard format. Port the color science engine from proto2 for palette generation with WCAG compliance.

phases.name: build-w3c-dtcg-token-system
phases.title: Build W3C DTCG token system
phases.description: Create packages/tokens/ implementing the W3C Design Tokens Community Group specification (2025.10 stable). Extract design tokens from .pen file variables into DTCG JSON format. Export to CSS custom properties, Tailwind config, and Style Dictionary format. Support theming (light/dark modes) via DTCG groups. Include token validation against the spec.
acceptanceCriteria: Tokens extracted from .pen variables in DTCG format

phases.name: port-color-science-engine-from-proto2
phases.title: Port color science engine from proto2
phases.description: Create packages/color/ porting the LCH color science from proto2's @proto/utils. Include: 11-step color scale generation (50-950), color harmonies (complementary, triadic, analogous, split-complementary, tetradic), WCAG contrast checking and scoring, semantic color mapping (primary, secondary, destructive, muted, etc.), palette generation from a single accent color. All using LCH/Oklch for perceptual uniformity.
acceptanceCriteria: 11-step scales generated from any base color
All harmony types produce valid palettes
WCAG AA/AAA contrast ratios calculated correctly
Palette generation from single accent color

milestones.title: Component Playground + Documentation
milestones.description: Build a Ladle-inspired component playground for live preview and auto-generated documentation from .pen files and component source.

phases.name: build-component-playground
phases.title: Build component playground
phases.description: Create a Vite-native component playground in packages/app with a /playground route. Ladle-inspired: fast startup, hot reload, component isolation. Features: component list sidebar, live preview panel, props editor (auto-generated from component schemas), viewport resizer, theme switcher (light/dark). Load components from the generated React output. Support CSF (Component Story Format) for custom stories.
acceptanceCriteria: Component list shows all generated components
Props editor allows interactive prop changes

phases.name: build-auto-generated-documentation
phases.title: Build auto-generated documentation
phases.description: Create a /docs route with auto-generated component documentation. For each component: props table (from TypeScript interface), usage examples (from .pen composition), design token references, accessibility notes, related components. Use the .pen file metadata and generated code as sources. Render docs with markdown + live component embeds.

milestones.title: TinaCMS Site Builder
milestones.description: Integrate TinaCMS for git-backed content management and visual editing of the documentation site.

phases.name: integrate-tinacms-with-vite-react
phases.title: Integrate TinaCMS with Vite+React
phases.description: Add TinaCMS to the starter kit. Configure for git-backed content (markdown + JSON in the repo). Set up content schema for: pages, component docs, design guidelines, changelog. Visual editing via useTina hook. Create a /site route for the public-facing documentation site with TinaCMS admin panel at /admin. Self-hosted mode (no TinaCloud dependency).
acceptanceCriteria: Visual editing works with live preview
Content stored as markdown/JSON in git
Pages, component docs, guidelines content types

phases.name: build-site-theme-and-layout-system
phases.title: Build site theme and layout system
phases.description: Create the documentation site theme and layout components. Navigation sidebar with component categories (atoms/molecules/organisms), search, breadcrumbs. Token-driven theming using the DTCG token system. Responsive layout. Print-friendly component sheets.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation sidebar with atomic design categories

milestones.title: AI Agents — Design + Implement
milestones.description: Build the core AI agents for design decisions and code generation from .pen files.

phases.name: build-design-agent
phases.title: Build Design Agent
phases.description: Create an AI agent that makes design decisions: layout, spacing, typography, responsive breakpoints. Uses Pencil MCP tools (batch_design, set_variables, get_screenshot, snapshot_layout) to manipulate .pen files. Takes natural language design requests and translates them into .pen modifications. Includes system prompt with design principles (spacing scales, typography hierarchy, color theory basics).
acceptanceCriteria: Agent modifies .pen files via Pencil MCP
Layout and spacing decisions follow design principles
Agent can create new components in .pen files

phases.name: build-implement-agent
phases.title: Build Implement Agent
phases.description: Create an AI agent that converts .pen designs to production React code. Uses the pen-to-react pipeline from packages/codegen. Can generate individual components or entire component libraries. Understands the code generation output and can refine it based on feedback. Writes generated components to the output directory with proper file structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Agent generates React from .pen via codegen pipeline
Can generate single component or full library
Writes files to correct output directory
Agent can refine output based on feedback

milestones.title: AI Agents — A11y + Color
milestones.description: Build accessibility auditing and color theory agents.

phases.name: build-a11y-agent
phases.title: Build A11y Agent
phases.description: Create an AI agent that audits components for accessibility. Wraps axe-core for automated WCAG checking. AI analysis layer on top for semantic a11y issues that axe-core misses (context-dependent alt text, logical tab order, meaningful link text). Generates remediation suggestions with code examples. Can audit individual components or full pages.
acceptanceCriteria: axe-core audit runs on rendered components
AI analysis identifies semantic a11y issues
Can audit single component or full page

phases.name: build-color-agent
phases.title: Build Color Agent
phases.description: Create an AI agent for color theory and palette management. Uses the color science engine (packages/color/) for palette generation. Can generate complete color systems from a single brand color. Ensures WCAG contrast compliance across all color pairs. Supports theme variant generation (light/dark/high-contrast). Integrates with the token system to update design tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: Generates full palette from single brand color
WCAG contrast compliance for all pairs
Updates design tokens via token system

milestones.title: XCL + Component Registry
milestones.description: Port the XCL converter and component registry pattern from proto2 for efficient AI-driven component work.

phases.name: port-xcl-converter-from-proto2
phases.title: Port XCL converter from proto2
phases.description: Create packages/xcl/ porting the XML Component Language converter from proto2. XCL provides 80-96% token reduction for LLM component operations. Include: component-to-XCL serializer, XCL-to-component deserializer, XCL-to-TSX direct converter, round-trip fidelity validation. Adapt for React 19 patterns (no forwardRef, function declarations).
acceptanceCriteria: XCL to TSX direct conversion generates valid code

phases.name: build-component-registry
phases.title: Build component registry
phases.description: Create packages/registry/ with a type-safe component registry. Adapted from proto2's ComponentRegistry pattern. Maps component names to: schemas (JSON Schema from TypeScript), import paths, categories (atomic design), framework targets, .pen source references. Search by name, category, tags. Auto-populate from generated components.
acceptanceCriteria: Register components with schemas and metadata
JSON Schema auto-generated from TypeScript interfaces

milestones.title: MCP Server + Monorepo Skeleton
milestones.description: Build the MCP server exposing all platform capabilities and wire the monorepo scaffold.

phases.name: build-mcp-server-for-design-system
phases.title: Build MCP server for design system
phases.description: Create packages/mcp/ exposing design system capabilities as MCP tools. Tool categories: Design (read/write .pen files), Tokens (CRUD, export CSS/Tailwind), Components (generate React/HTML, list components), A11y (audit component, check contrast), Color (generate palette, check contrast). Uses the tools package pattern from ai-agent-app (defineSharedTool + toMCPTool adapter).
acceptanceCriteria: MCP server starts and lists all tools
A11y tools run audits and return results

phases.name: create-monorepo-skeleton-and-scaffold-function
phases.title: Create monorepo skeleton and scaffold function
phases.description: Create the starter kit directory structure at libs/templates/starters/design-system/ with root package.json (npm workspaces). Packages: pen, codegen, tokens, color, a11y, xcl, registry, agents, mcp, app, server. Add scaffoldDesignSystemStarter() to scaffold.ts. Add design-system to StarterKitType. Wire all integration points.

milestones.title: Documentation + Polish + Ship
milestones.description: Write comprehensive docs, create starter features for the board, and verify end-to-end.

phases.name: write-documentation-and-readme
phases.title: Write documentation and README
phases.description: Create docs/ at the starter kit root following Diataxis framework. Getting started quickstart, concept guides (design-to-code pipeline, token system, AI agents), how-to guides (adding components, customizing tokens, running agents, building the site), reference docs (API, MCP tools, .pen format). Create comprehensive README with architecture diagram.
acceptanceCriteria: Quickstart gets user running in 5 minutes

phases.name: end-to-end-verification-and-build-test
phases.title: End-to-end verification and build test
phases.description: Scaffold to temp directory, run npm install and npm run build, verify no @@PROJECT_NAME tokens remain, verify no @protolabsai imports. Test the full pipeline: drop .pen file, run codegen, verify React output compiles, verify docs generate, verify playground renders. Run main repo tests.
acceptanceCriteria: .pen to React pipeline produces valid components

prd.situation: protoLabs Studio has a mature .pen design file ecosystem: a parser (libs/pen-parser), a full React renderer (designs-view), a property inspector, component library panel, and Pencil MCP integration. Proto2 explored AI-driven design system tooling with XCL (80-96% token reduction), LCH color science (58/58 tests), and component registries. The scaffold system supports docs, portfolio, landing-page, extension, general, and ai-agent-app starter kits but has no design system kit. No open-source AI-native end-to-end design system platform exists in the market.
prd.problem: Frontend teams building design systems have no integrated open-source platform. Current tools are fragmented: Storybook for components (no design integration), zeroheight for docs (SaaS only), Knapsack for design-code sync (enterprise $$$), Locofy for Figma-to-code (Figma-locked). Teams must glue 4-5 tools together. AI-driven design-to-code generation exists only in closed platforms. The .pen file format and existing parser/renderer infrastructure are underutilized.
prd.approach: Extract and extend the .pen ecosystem into a monorepo starter kit. Build a pen-to-code generator layered on the existing parser and style-utils. Port XCL converter and color science from proto2. Add W3C DTCG design token management. Build a Ladle-inspired component playground. Integrate TinaCMS for git-backed site building. Create AI agents (Design, Implement, A11y, Color) using Claude Agent SDK with MCP tools. Ship as libs/templates/starters/design-system/.
prd.results: Users scaffold a complete design system platform. They drop .pen files in, AI agents generate React components with proper tokens and documentation. Component playground shows live previews. TinaCMS site builder lets non-developers manage the documentation site. A11y agent audits components automatically. Color agent generates WCAG-compliant palettes. Everything is git-backed, self-hosted, and extensible via MCP plugins.
prd.constraints: React 19 best practices only. Claude Agent SDK as primary AI driver. npm workspaces. Must integrate with existing scaffold system. All extracted code fully decoupled from @protolabsai packages. W3C DTCG token format for interop. Ladle-level startup speed for playground (not Storybook-heavy). TinaCMS lightweight mode (git-backed, no Redis/MongoDB). Port proto2 assets with tests from day one.
